mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(merchant_uid, member_id, total_amount) VALUES(#{merchantUid}, #{memberId}, #{totalAmount});
INSERT INTO orderdetail(detail_quantity, merchant_uid, product_no) VALUES(#{detailQuantity}, #{merchantUid}, #{productNo});
INSERT INTO payment(imp_uid, merchant_uid, payment_method, amount, paid_at) VALUES(#{impUid}, #{merchantUid}, #{paymentMethod}, #{amount}, #{paidAt});
INSERT INTO shipping(merchant_uid, recipient_name, address, phone_number) VALUES(#{merchantUid}, #{recipientName}, #{address}, #{phoneNumber});
